targets.expr: (count(sum(kube_node_status_condition{condition="Ready", status!="true", unique_cluster_name=~"${ACK}"} == 1) by (node)) or vector(0)) / (count(sum(kube_node_status_condition{unique_cluster_name=~"${ACK}"}) by(node)) or vector(1))

panels.description: 当前集群的每秒请求数总量（包括全部读写请求）
panels.title: API server QPS

targets.expr: sum(group(kube_node_labels{unique_cluster_name=~"${ACK}"})by (node,label_alibabacloud_com_nodepool_id) * on (node) group_left() sum(kube_pod_info{unique_cluster_name=~"${ACK}"} * on (pod) group_left() (sum (kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{unique_cluster_name=~"${ACK}"})by(pod)))by (node))by(label_alibabacloud_com_nodepool_id) / sum(group(kube_node_labels{unique_cluster_name=~"${ACK}"})by (node,label_alibabacloud_com_nodepool_id) * on (node) group_left() sum(kube_node_status_capacity_memory_bytes{unique_cluster_name=~"${ACK}"})by(node))by (label_alibabacloud_com_nodepool_id)

sum(group(kube_node_labels{unique_cluster_name=~"${ACK}"})by (node,label_alibabacloud_com_nodepool_id) * on (node) group_left() sum(kube_pod_info{unique_cluster_name=~"${ACK}"} * on (pod) group_left() (sum (kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{unique_cluster_name=~"${ACK}"})by(pod)))by (node))by(label_alibabacloud_com_nodepool_id) / sum(group(kube_node_labels{unique_cluster_name=~"${ACK}"})by (node,label_alibabacloud_com_nodepool_id) * on (node) group_left() sum(kube_node_status_capacity_cpu_cores{unique_cluster_name=~"${ACK}"})by(node))by (label_alibabacloud_com_nodepool_id)

count(kube_pod_status_ready{condition="false",unique_cluster_name=~"${ACK}"}==1) by(namespace) - (count(kube_pod_status_phase{phase="Succeeded",unique_cluster_name=~"${ACK}"}==1) by(namespace) or vector(0)) or count(kube_pod_status_ready{condition="false",unique_cluster_name=~"${ACK}"}==1) by(namespace)
